response.justification: While Bogdan is a highly experienced Staff-level software engineer with strong expertise in TypeScript, AWS, and distributed systems, he falls significantly short of the strict requirement for 8+ years of experience specifically building AI-driven solutions. His resume indicates only very recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol, lacking demonstrated experience with Python, vector databases, RAG architectures, and LLM evaluation pipelines necessary for this specialized Forward Deployed GenAI role.
strengths: Extensive 15+ year background in software engineering, including multiple Staff and Senior-level roles.
Strong expertise in TypeScript, Node.js, and cloud infrastructure deployment (AWS CDK, Kubernetes).
Recent hands-on experience developing AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling.
concerns: Does not meet the required minimum of 8 years specifically building and shipping production-grade AI solutions.
Missing core AI technologies from his tech stack, particularly Python, vector databases, and RAG architectures.
Lacks demonstrated experience building LLM evaluation pipelines and observability frameworks for AI quality assurance.
